title: Robot charging station protective member
abstract: An electrical charging station for charging an autonomous robot includes a charging station frame having a frame base with a plurality of interconnected frame elements configured to be secured to a floor. One of the frame elements is a front side frame element. There is a charging station cover mounted on the charging station frame and the charging station cover includes a front side cover having a front surface with a charging member. There is a protective member extending across and having a front surface projecting outwardly from the front surface of the front side cover. The protective member is interconnected to the front side frame element through a plurality of apertures in the front side cover and the front side frame element is located adjacent to a back surface of the front side cover, opposite the front surface.
claims:
Claims Claim(s)  I/we claim: 1. An electrical charging station for charging an autonomous robot, comprising: a charging station frame, including a frame base having a plurality of interconnected frame elements which are configured to be secured to a floor on which the electrical charging station will be located; one of the frame elements of the frame base being a front side frame element; a charging station cover mounted on the charging station frame, the charging station cover including a front side cover having a front surface with a charging member configured to receive a second charging member on the autonomous robot when the autonomous robot is docked with the charging station for charging; a protective member extending across and having a front surface projecting outwardly from the front surface of the front side cover; the protective member being interconnected to the front side frame element through a plurality of apertures in the front side cover, the front side frame element located adjacent to a back surface of the front side cover, opposite the front surface. 2. The electrical charging station of claim 1 wherein the first charging element includes one of a male charging member or a female charging member and the second charging member includes the other of the male or female charging member. 3. The electrical charging station of claim 1 wherein the front side element includes a C- shaped member extending across the width of the charging station having at least one aperture at each end thereof configured to receive a fastener for securing the front side element to the floor. 4. The electrical charging station of claim 3 wherein the front side element further includes a flange member integral with the C-shaped member and extending across the width of the charging station and projecting out from a top surface of the C-Shaped member. 

 The electrical charging station of claim 4 wherein the flange member includes a front surface which is parallel to the front surface of the protective member and the front surface of the flange member is located adjacent to the back surface of the front side cover; and wherein the protective member is secured to the flange member of the front side frame element by fasteners through the plurality of apertures in the front side cover. The electrical charging station of claim 5 wherein the plurality of interconnected frame elements further include a right side frame element interconnected to a first end of the front side frame element and a left side frame element interconnected to a second end of the front side frame element. The electrical charging station of claim 6 wherein the plurality of interconnected frame elements further includes a back side frame element interconnected between the right side frame element and the left side frame element; wherein the backside element includes at least one aperture at each end thereof configured to receive a fastener for securing the back side element to the floor.
